transitionPreparingDescription: Creating your business profile and preparing secure checkout.
title: Register Your Business
subtitle: Set up your branch profile to start listing and managing leads.
sectionBasicsSubtitle: Core identity details visible to your customers.
hintBusinessName: Type at least 2 letters for name suggestions.
hintSeanebId: 6-30 characters. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphen (-) only.
hintBusinessEmailOptional: Optional. You can verify it now or later.
noteOtpSentToThisNumber: OTP will be sent to this number.
hintWhatsappOptional: Optional. Leave blank to use the primary number.
noteWhatsappOtpSent: OTP will be sent on WhatsApp to this number.
noteWhatsappSameAsPrimary: Using the same number as primary. WhatsApp verification not required.
hintBusinessWebsiteOptional: Optional. Add your website URL if you have one.
sectionAddressSubtitle: Add accurate location details so listings and local discovery work correctly.
hintBusinessLocation: Select a valid location from autocomplete results.
sectionComplianceSubtitle: You can verify PAN and GST now or later from your dashboard.
sectionPaymentSubtitle: Review the onboarding charge and complete registration with Cashfree.
paymentBannerExistingBusiness: Your business is already created. Complete the onboarding payment to finish registration.
paymentNote: A secure Cashfree modal will open when you continue.
paymentLoadError: Unable to load onboarding charges right now. Please try again.
otpSubtitleWhatsapp: Enter the 4-digit OTP sent by WhatsApp
otpHelperSms: If the SMS does not arrive, wait for the timer to finish and resend the OTP on WhatsApp.
otpHelperWhatsappSamePrimary: We sent the OTP on WhatsApp to the same primary number.
otpHelperWhatsappNumber: We sent the OTP on WhatsApp to the number above.
otpHelperEmail: Use the code from your inbox to complete verification.
otpEnterCodeHint: Enter the 4-digit code. You can paste the full OTP into the first box.
panVerificationAfterBranch: PAN verification will be available right after branch creation.
gstinVerificationAfterBranch: GSTIN verification will be available right after branch creation.
errorSessionExpiredBeforePayment: Session expired. Please login again before reviewing payment.
errorChargePreviewUnavailable: Unable to load onboarding charge preview right now.
validationPrimaryNumberValidContinue: Enter a valid primary number to continue
validationBusinessEmailValid: Enter a valid business email or keep it empty
validationBusinessLocationAutocompleteCo: Select a valid location from autocomplete to continue
validationPanValidOptional: Enter a valid PAN number or leave it empty
validationGstinValidOptional: Enter a valid GSTIN number or leave it empty
validationAgreeTerms: You must agree to the terms and conditions
validationPaymentLoading: Loading onboarding charge preview. Please wait a moment.
validationPaymentPreviewUnavailable: Onboarding charge preview is unavailable right now.
errorSendBusinessEmailOtp: Failed to send business email OTP
errorVerifyPrimaryNumber: Enter a valid primary number to verify
errorVerifyWhatsappNumber: Enter a valid WhatsApp number to verify
errorMainCategoryUnavailable: Main category is not available right now. Please retry in a moment.
errorVerifyBusinessMobile: Please verify business mobile number before registration
errorVerifySeaNeB: Please verify SeaNeB ID before registration
errorSelectValidLocation: Please select a valid location from autocomplete to capture coordinates
errorAgreeTerms: You must agree to the terms and conditions
errorPaymentUnavailable: Payment session is unavailable right now.
errorCashfreeUnavailable: Cashfree checkout is unavailable right now. Please refresh and try again.
errorPaymentFailed: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
